name: JSON Formatter
description: Format, validate, and beautify your JSON data online.
keywords: json formatter, json beautifier, json validator, format json, json prettify, json editor
howToUse: 1. Paste JSON data 2. Click Format/Beautify 3. See formatted output 4. Copy or validate
faq: Q: Does it validate JSON? A: Yes, shows errors. Q: Can I minify? A: Yes, use Minify button.
